title: デビュー戦の後に・出立、悠々と

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for your support, everyone!
Thank you, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Did you see, Trainer? My very first race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's wonderful to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is the first step toward achieving my goal. I'm
glad I managed to make an impressive start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. I was just... absorbed in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking of how, having been successful
in my debut, I've gained the opportunity to strive
for my goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho is a race treasured in the
memories of both my grandmother and
grandfather, the pillars of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, my desire is to win the Tenno Sho, no
matter what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My abilities as a stayer have been valued highly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to set a goal of conquering the
spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To honor the Mejiro family and its members, who
have showered me with love all my life.
choice_data_list: Then let's aim for the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm merely at the starting point right
now. The Tenno Sho is still a ways in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have plenty of time, so I must carefully hone my
abilities.
choice_data_list:
We can start by gaining some experience in the
junior- and classic-year races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, so that I can claim victory in the spring
Tenno Sho without fail!
